coarse_alignment_reason: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.
chinese_text:
麟之趾，振振公子，于嗟麟兮。
麟之定，振振公姓，于嗟麟兮。
麟之角，振振公族，于嗟麟兮。
translation_text:
The feet of the lin:—
The noble sons of our prince,
Ah! they are the lin!

The forehead of the lin:—
The noble grandsons of our prince,
Ah! they are the lin!

The horn of the lin:—
The noble kindred of our prince,
Ah! they are the lin!
